findings.title: Non-human identity has no accountable owner
findings.remediation: Assign an Owner tag (team or email). Unowned NHIs are the ones that never get reviewed or offboarded.

findings.title: Role unused for 410 days
findings.nist_800_53: NIST 800-53 AC-2 (Account Management); NIST 800-53 AC-6 (Least Privilege)
findings.remediation: Disable, then remove after a retention window. Mirrors your on-prem disablement-before-deletion pattern.

findings.title: Policy grants Action:* on Resource:* (effective admin)
findings.remediation: Scope to the specific actions/resources actually used. TODO: confirm with Access Advisor last-accessed data.

findings.title: Role trust policy allows any principal to assume it
findings.nist_800_53: NIST 800-53 AC-6 (Least Privilege); NIST 800-53 IA-9 (Service Identification and Authentication)
findings.remediation: Restrict the trust policy to specific, intended principals. This is the cross-account assumption risk your STS/AssumeRole detection pipeline watches for.

findings.title: Active access key is 420 days old (no rotation)
findings.remediation: Rotate the key, or migrate the workload off static keys to an STS-assumed role / OIDC federation.

findings.title: Workload authenticates with long-lived static credentials
findings.remediation: Target state is short-lived federated credentials (IRSA / GitHub OIDC) or an assumed role, not static keys.

findings.title: Secret has rotation disabled
findings.remediation: Enable automatic rotation with an appropriate interval.
